At Cedar Loop Beverages, Verner Haugstad conducts his professional communications using Filipino sentences, reflecting his dedication to inclusivity in the workplace. A graduate of Driftwood School of Letters, he has established a reputation for his literary work published by Waterlily Grove Publications. In addition to his writing career, Verner serves as a Judge for Halcyon Youth Forum, where he mentors and evaluates young talent. His multifaceted pursuits merge community involvement with artistic expression, making him a well-rounded contributor to both literature and youth advocacy.
